chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 406 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of CMA No.7539/2024 (151 CPC) 09.12.2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< On 11.11.2025, Additional District Accounts Officer, Shaheed Benazirabad had appeared and submitted that entire amount has been paid to the Petitioner, whereas, after such statement counsel for the petitioner sought time to verify the same. Today, neither applicant nor his Counsel is present. The deliberate absence on the part of the applicant/petitioner prima facie suggests that either the purpose of listed application has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing it. Accordingly, the listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
